d2e_endpoint_claim_boundary.summary: Auxiliary action spaces remain source-specific. Only D2E keyboard/mouse endpoints can support D2E desktop-action claims after D2E finetune/eval.

action_heads.supervision: per-frame Atari action demonstrations with gaze/reward metadata
action_heads.action_signal: ALE action integer/action enum per frame; gaze fields optional and not required for IDM/FDM action training
action_heads.claim_boundary: This auxiliary head may train a shared backbone or source-specific head only; D2E keyboard/mouse endpoint claims require D2E eval evidence after finetuning.

action_heads.supervision: human players playing Minecraft; video feed and actions captured/stored
action_heads.action_signal: state-action demonstrations with Minecraft camera/button/control fields via MineRL data tooling
action_heads.claim_boundary: This auxiliary head may train a shared backbone or source-specific head only; D2E keyboard/mouse endpoint claims require D2E eval evidence after finetuning.

action_heads.supervision: 10M 84x84 frames and actions collected from Atari Breakout agent training
action_heads.action_signal: action-conditioned video prediction records with train/val/test splits
action_heads.claim_boundary: This auxiliary head may train a shared backbone or source-specific head only; D2E keyboard/mouse endpoint claims require D2E eval evidence after finetuning.

claim_boundary: Action registry only; it does not materialize sources, train G005, checkpoint goals, or prove D2E+aux model quality.
